title: Default 8×8(＆Item,GUI)
description: This resource pack changes the appearance of blocks, items, and GUI to half the default size (8×8).
body:
![ITEM.GUIversion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557068677901bc03bf67189cbee3514680916900.webp)
# Default 8×8
This resource pack is a simple pack that changes the appearance of blocks, items, and GUIs to half their default size.
